chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD 2nd Appeal No.S-114 of 2024. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 13.10.2025. Mr. Imdad Ali Memon, Advocate for Appellants. ***************************************** Counsel present for Appellants submits that the matter has been resolved out of the Court; therefore, he does not press the instant Appeal. Accordingly, the 2nd Appeal No.S-114 of 2024 is hereby dismissed as not pressed subject to all its consequences. JUDGE Ali.
